name: Goosehead Insurance, Inc.
business: Goosehead Insurance is an independent insurance agency that distributes personal lines insurance policies (home, auto, umbrella, etc.) through corporate sales, franchise sales, and enterprise partnerships across the United States.
sellsTo: mortgage servicers, lenders, and real estate companies

exposures.sentence: We are a rapidly growing independent insurance agency, reinventing the traditional approach to distributing personal lines policies throughout the United States.

catalysts.sentence: On April 23, 2025, our board of directors approved a new share repurchase program with authorization to purchase up to $100 million of our Class A common stock through May 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Extension and increase of share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, our board of directors extended our share repurchase program, increasing the authorization by $180.0 million and extending the program through May 1, 2027.
The Company entered into a new credit agreement on January 8, 2025 for a $300 million term loan and a $75 million revolving credit facility, of which nothing was drawn as of December 31, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: approximately $533 billion U.S. personal lines P&C industry
tamClaims.sentence: We primarily compete in the approximately $533 billion (according to the National Association of Insurance Commissioners Data) U.S. personal lines P&C industry.
